creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2010-09-15 22:42:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/tnote      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  A small note taking program for the terminal.
  
  Tnote aims to be a small, quick and easy to use note taking app for
  the terminalsimilar to sticky style gui note taking apps such as
  Tomboy notes.
  
  WWW:    http://sourceforge.net/projects/tnote/
  
  PR:             148935
  Submitted by:   ports@c0decafe.net
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.405     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/deskutils/tnote/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/tnote/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/deskutils/tnote/pkg-descr (new)
